title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sahyadri Hospitals - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sahyadri Hospitals - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Sahyadri Hospitals, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sahyadri Hospitals:
Sahyadri Hospitals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sahyadri Hospitals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
